changelog.change: · enhance and improvements to the download library.
· fix resume to short prevent to open in shorts tab.
· fixes backup restore to handle with the new implementation backuping backup.
· due to internal api changes please update to this version YTKPlus v4.6 , before 06-06-2026.
· Updated iPA to newer YouTube v21.08

descriptionlist.longdescription:
In-App Purchase: $3.99

In-App Settings:
• Download videos, audio, Shorts, and post images.
• Enjoy full-speed 🚀 downloads with a built-in Download Manager.
• Import videos to Photos or directly into the YTKPlus library.
• Block all advertisements for a clean experience.
• Play media in the background.
• Stream HD videos over Wi-Fi, 3G, 4G, or 5G.
• Streaming and downloading 2k-4k videos on Supported Device ip15 and later.
• Set default playback quality for Wi-Fi and Cellular.
• Customize or hide tab bar icons and layouts.
• Includes built-in SponsorBlock integration (FREE).
• Picture in Picture (PiP).
• Fake location.
• And many more settings…
• Supports iPadOS.


IPA & TrollStore Version:
  • Instructions available here...


    • · OR copy this source and add it to ur source list on Altstore, Esign etc..
    · https://repo.ikghd.me/repo.json

    Refund Policy:
    · Refunds accepted for issues like Safe Mode or if the tweak doesn't work
    · Must provide full details about the issue, including photos & crash logs
    · Change of mind not accepted – review details, photos, and videos before buying
    · Refunds, if accepted, will be processed within 3 to 7 days
    · Thank you 🤗 & enjoy!

    Subscription | Key & Devices:
    · 1-year subscription (364 days)
    · The key is for 1 device and is transferable

    For more information, refer to the FAQ page:
  • FAQ page
